concerns.text: FR-004 defines the p‑value discrepancy tolerance as `max(0.01, [deferred] of the reported p‑value)`, which diverges from the idea’s rule of an absolute difference > 0.05. This changes the detection methodology.
The idea specifies an explicit effect‑size discrepancy criterion (|effect_reported − Δ̂| > 5 % relative). FR‑004 does not list this rule, so the spec omits a required consistency check.

The idea includes a separate sample‑size discrepancy check (> 5 % relative difference). FR‑004 only mentions a generic “internal inconsistency” clause, which does not clearly capture the idea’s sample‑size rule.
FR‑004 still contains the placeholder `[deferred]` for the p‑value tolerance, leaving the rule undefined and preventing faithful implementation of the intended methodology.
